title: View + edit a list's config in the board UI, persisted atomically to board.json (board-rev CAS)

tests.summary: 23 passed: applyListConfig (edit agent list; reject unknown list / bad validNext / bad trigger / newline+traversal in taskType+skill / agent-only field on a manual list; id/order/kind invariant) + saveBoardCAS concurrency (two same-rev edits → exactly one wins, rev advances once; stale rev conflicts)

build.summary: UI dist rebuilt; next build green

e2e.summary: LIVE: GET /lists → PATCH /lists/plan (skill+executePrompt+validNext) persisted to board.json on disk; bad validNext → 400; manual-list agent field → 400; board-rev CAS: rev 0 → PATCH(rev0)=200(rev→1) → PATCH(stale rev0)=409 → PATCH(rev1)=200; two CONCURRENT HTTP PATCHes same rev → one 200, one 409, on-disk rev advanced exactly once. UI: per-list gear opens Configure modal (manual=title+validNext only; agent=skill/trigger/taskType/tier/mode/execute+router prompts/validNext)

codexReview.notes: r1: last-writer-wins on board.json (no CAS) → added board-rev + 409; r2: rev check not atomic (TOCTOU) → extracted withFileLock, added withBoardLock + saveBoardCAS (true critical section); r3 approve

codexPwTest.summary: codex sandbox cannot launch Chromium; UI verified via repo Playwright (Configure modal for manual + agent lists) + live HTTP CAS

by: vision review of the live Configure modals
designAudit.notes: manual list correctly limited to title+validNext; agent list shows all fields; no emoji (GearIcon SVG); responsive Sheet

video.notes: shots: 01-board, 02-list-config-editor (Configure: Backlog — manual), 03-agent-list-config (Configure: Plan — full agent config incl. live-edited execute prompt)
